/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/LocoLink.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LocoLink.dir/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LocoLink.dir/SystemManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LocoLink.dir/RouteEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LocoLink.dir/RouteCache.cpp.o -o LocoLink   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-connector-c++/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-connector-c++/lib -lmysqlcppconnx
